description_long: This is a small, rectangular juice box with a predominantly purple and white color scheme. The front displays the SunRype brand logo, the word 'raisin', and an image of dark grapes, suggesting a grape juice flavor. The sides of the box feature a barcode, nutritional information panel, and additional product details. The top of the box has a small, circular pull tab for opening, and the packaging appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical of single-serve juice cartons. The box is slightly crumpled, indicating it is lightweight and flexible. The overall appearance is that of a single-serving juice drink commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or convenience stores.
description: A small, purple and white SunRype juice box with grape imagery and a pull tab on top, made of laminated paperboard.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with the barcode and part of the SunRype logo, as well as the top pull tab.
description_view_1: The front view displays the SunRype logo, 'raisin' label, and a cluster of grapes, making the flavor and branding clear.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the nutritional information panel and product details, with less branding visible.
description_view_3: This view highlights the top of the box, showing the pull tab and the word 'grape', along with the side panel text.
